element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Question mark panels grant shells and bananas for attacking opponents
Coins increase top speed; losing coins when hit provides mercy mechanic

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mushroom Cup but refined in Flower Cup
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Power sliding maintains speed during turns; hopping enables tighter corner execution
Temporary speed increase; combined with ramps for aerial launches
Short ramps launch karts airborne; combinable with boost panels for higher jumps
Temporary invincibility state; high-value power-up for momentum advantage
Computer characters use character-specific special powers strategically
Final difficulty tier with aggressive AI and higher speed requirements
Destroy opponent balloons using power-ups in arena settings

typical_relief_triggers: Landing power-up on question mark panel
Successfully executing power slide without spinning
typical_tension_triggers: Missing racing line on sharp turns
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Short-burst tension cycles within each race; relief punctuated by power-up acquisition and position changes; escalating pressure across cup progression and difficulty tiers

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Boost panels and ramps placed as optional speed routes; Battle Mode arenas have destructible environment elements

difficulty_curve.early_game: Mushroom Cup at 50cc introduces basic racing with forgiving AI and ample power-up access
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Flower and Star Cups at 100cc increase AI aggression and require mastery of power sliding and hopping; strategic power-up usage becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Special Cup at 100cc and all cups at 150cc feature aggressive computer-controlled opponents with character-specific special powers; track complexity requires precision maneuver execution
notable_spikes: Special Cup unlock (new track patterns and tighter competition)
150cc difficulty unlock (speed and AI precision demand spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: Four cups, each containing 5 sequential races; players accumulate points across races to determine cup winner; creates escalating tension across 5-race blocks
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mushroom Cup, Flower Cup, Star Cup, Special Cup

notable_level_patterns.description: Question mark panels distributed across tracks; create dynamic moment-to-moment tension as racers compete for power-up access
Chevron boost panels and ramps placed strategically to create high-speed launch moments and skill-based shortcuts
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mario Circuit, Donut Plains, Koopa Beach

notable_level_patterns.description: Computer opponents feature character-specific special powers that increase in effectiveness at higher difficulty levels
